title: Scroll-Wheel-Command
description: 一个仿APEX风格的轮盘快捷命令/A wheel shortcut command imitating APEX style
body:
English introduction（With Google translate）


✨ Features

-Customizable command entries (single or multiple subcommand sequences)

-Independent delay for each subcommand (milliseconds), default 0ms

-Paging wheel (default 10 per page, adjustable from 8–12), display of page turn indicators and Page X/Y text

-Sector highlighting and precise angle selection; any direction is selectable for single commands

-Plain text sector layout with center-aligned text, divider, and central circular tooltip

-Optional "background dimming/transparency" overlay (configurable)

-Advanced color picker (RGBA/HSB switching, live preview, hex display)

📦 Installation

-Install Fabric Loader and Fabric API (corresponding to 1.21.1).

-Download the release JAR for this mod (e.g., build/libs/Scroll-Whell-Command-0.2.jar or the latest version from GitHub Releases).

-Place the JAR in the .minecraft/mods/ directory.

-Start the game.


🎮 Usage

-Press the middle mouse button to open the wheel; release the middle/left button to execute the selected command; right-click to cancel.

-Page up: PageUp / PageDown (or press the configured mouse wheel/hotkey).

-Key hints are dynamically displayed in the center of the wheel (synchronized with the actual key bindings).

-Selection Logic:
For a single command: Release in any direction to execute.
For multiple commands: Select the corresponding sector by angle (based on full-screen angle).

⚙️ Settings & Command Editor

-Open "Mod Settings" in-game to enter the settings interface for this mod.

-The Command Editor uses a "list-first" workflow: Add/Edit/Delete/Done buttons are located at the bottom.

-Multiple command items support configuring independent delays (in milliseconds) for each sub-command.

-Color settings support RGBA/HSB switching with real-time preview and a one-click restore to default.

-The number of pages per wheel can be adjusted between 8–12 (default 10).


Q&A

Q: why? "Whell" instead of" wheel"?

A: I typed it wrong when I created the project, and I didn't find this spelling mistake at that time. I only found it spelled "Whell" when I sent it to my friend.


————————————————————————————————


**中文介绍**

✨ Features 功能

-自定义命令项（单条或多子命令序列）

-每个子命令独立延时（毫秒），默认 0ms

-轮盘分页（默认每页 10，支持 8–12 可调），显示翻页指示与 Page X/Y 文本

-扇区高亮与精确角度选择；单条命令时任意方向可选

-纯文本扇区布局，文本居中对齐，分割线与中央圆形提示区

-可选“背景调暗/透明度”覆盖层（可配置）

-高级颜色选择器（RGBA/HSB 切换、实时预览、Hex 显示）



📦 Installation 安装

-安装 Fabric Loader 与 Fabric API（对应 1.21.1）。

-下载本模组的发布版 JAR（例如 build/libs/Scroll-Whell-Command-0.2.jar 或 GitHub Releases 最新版本）。

-将 JAR 放入 .minecraft/mods/ 目录。

-启动游戏。

🎮 Usage 使用方法

-按下鼠标中键开启轮盘；松开中键/左键执行所选命令；右键取消。

-翻页：PageUp / PageDown（或按配置的鼠标滚轮/热键）。

-轮盘中央区域会动态显示键位提示（与实际按键绑定同步）。

-选择逻辑：
单条命令时：任意方向松手即可执行。
多条命令时：按角度选择对应扇区（全屏角度判定）。

⚙️ Settings & Command Editor 设置与命令编辑器

-在游戏内打开“模组设置”，进入本模组的设置界面。

-命令编辑器采用“列表优先”工作流：新增/编辑/删除/完成按钮位于底部。

-多命令项支持为每个子命令配置独立延时（毫秒）。

-颜色设置支持 RGBA/HSB 切换，实时预览；支持一键恢复默认。

-轮盘每页数量可在 8–12 之间调整（默认 10）。


Q&A

Q:为什么是"whell"而不是"wheel"？

A:创建项目的时候打错了，且当时没发现这个拼写错误，等发给朋友时才发现拼成了"whell"
